meta.title: ATC Reading Script — KPAO to KSQL
meta.description: Complete pilot-side reading script for N17XX, KPAO→KSQL VFR. Read each turn at controller cadence to drive ownship-only ATC dialog.

props.title: ATC Reading Script
props.subtitle: KPAO → KSQL · November One Seven X-ray X-ray
props.meta: ATC-to-ownship only · 14 turns across 8 phases · 5 compound, 9 single

props.content: Every line below is you speaking as ATC to **November One Seven X-ray X-ray**. Read each line at normal controller cadence, including the full phonetic callsign every time — never "N17XX". Compound turns must be split by the system, with a single composed readback covering every segment.

props.label: SCRIPT METRICS
props.title: Turn Inventory
How to read this
props.content:
Each turn shows: **transcript** (what you say as ATC), **expected readback** (what the system should compose back), and an **optional note** (compound segments, AIM grounding). Compound badges flag instructions with 2+ segments — the system must split them and produce one composite readback covering every segment.

Turn IDs use **P{phase}.{idx}** notation matching the original canvas indexing.

props.label: PHASE 0 · FLIGHT SERVICE STATION
props.title: Pre-Flight Briefing
P0.2 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, Flight Service, conditions VFR, ceiling unlimited, winds calm at surface, winds aloft two nine zero at one two, visibility one five plus, no significant weather
props.content: **Expected readback →** Roger, conditions VFR, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

props.label: PHASE 1 · PALO ALTO GROUND
props.title: Startup and Taxi

P1.2 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, Palo Alto ATIS Information Golf, wind three one zero at one zero, visibility one five, sky clear, temperature two zero, dewpoint one four, altimeter three zero point zero two, runway three one in use
props.content: **Expected readback →** Information Golf, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

props.title: P1.4 · COMPOUND — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, Palo Alto Ground, taxi runway three one via Alpha, Bravo, hold short
props.content:
**Expected readback →** Runway three one, taxi via Alpha, Bravo, hold short, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

_compound: taxi_instruction + hold_short_

props.label: PHASE 2 · PALO ALTO TOWER
props.title: Takeoff
P2.0 · COMPOUND — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, Palo Alto Tower, runway three one, wind three one zero at one zero, cleared for takeoff, maintain VFR
props.content:
**Expected readback →** Runway three one, cleared for takeoff, Maintain VFR, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

_compound: takeoff_clearance + vfr_instruction_

props.title: P2.2 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, Palo Alto Tower, positive rate, gear up, climb to two thousand five hundred
props.content: **Expected readback →** Climb and maintain two thousand five hundred, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

props.title: P2.4 · COMPOUND — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, Palo Alto Tower, climb to two thousand five hundred, contact NorCal Departure one two one point five
props.content:
**Expected readback →** climb and maintain 2500, Roger, 121.5, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

_compound: altitude_instruction + frequency_change_

props.label: PHASE 3 · NORCAL DEPARTURE
props.title: Departure
P3.0 · COMPOUND — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, NorCal Departure, radar contact, climbing through one thousand, maintain two thousand five hundred, direct San Carlos
props.content:
**Expected readback →** Radar contact, maintain two thousand five hundred, direct San Carlos, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

_compound: radar_identification + altitude + direct_to_

props.label: PHASE 4 · OAKLAND CENTER
props.title: Cruise
P4.4 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, Oakland Center, one zero miles northwest of San Carlos, maintaining two thousand five hundred, contact San Carlos Tower one one eight point three when ready
props.content: **Expected readback →** Roger, 118.3, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

props.label: PHASE 5 · SAN CARLOS TOWER
props.title: Approach

P5.0 · COMPOUND — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, San Carlos Tower, radar contact, one zero miles northwest, begin descent to one thousand five hundred, enter left downwind runway three zero, report downwind
props.content:
**Expected readback →** Radar contact, descend and maintain 1500, Enter left downwind, runway three zero, Report downwind, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

_compound: radar + altitude + pattern_entry + report_request_

props.title: P5.4 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, San Carlos Tower, downwind, runway three zero, report base
props.content: **Expected readback →** Report base, Runway three zero, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

props.label: PHASE 6 · SAN CARLOS TOWER
props.title: Pattern and Final
P6.0 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, San Carlos Tower, turn base, number two, follow Cessna on final
props.content:
**Expected readback →** November One Seven X-ray X-ray, Roger.

_sequencing — AIM 4-2-3.c pilot-echo policy_

props.title: P6.2 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, San Carlos Tower, turn final, runway three zero, wind three zero zero at one zero, cleared to land
props.content: **Expected readback →** Runway three zero, cleared to land, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

props.label: PHASE 7 · SAN CARLOS GROUND
props.title: Taxi to Parking
P7.2 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, San Carlos Ground, runway clear, taxi to parking spot one two via Bravo
props.content: **Expected readback →** Taxi to parking via Bravo, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.

props.title: P7.4 — November One Seven X-ray X-ray, San Carlos Ground, parking spot one two available
props.content: **Expected readback →** Roger, November One Seven X-ray X-ray.
